title: corysanthes fornicata
intro: Corysanthes fornicata, also known as the 'Club Moss', is a type of ancient vascular plant belonging to the group Lycopodiophyta. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antifungal, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Corysanthes fornicata include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although its usage and efficacy may vary depending on the region and preparation method.
